UYou
Summarize the release blockers for the roadmap project.
CClaude

Focus on fixture drift, popup persistence, release validation and screenshot determinism.

  1. Keep the DOM contracts stable.
  2. Verify extension state survives popup saves.
  3. Keep release and test artifacts aligned.
UYou
Also confirm project routes behave like normal conversations.
CClaude

Project chats should still expose the same message, sidebar and composer selectors.
